projectDescription: A production-grade Dockerfile and Containerfile linter and formatter that uses BuildKit's official parser to enforce best practices, security rules, and safe auto-fixes.
keyFeatures: BuildKit-native parser: understands heredocs, RUN --mount, COPY --link, and ADD --checksum
Safe auto-fixes with --fix; opt-in unsafe fixes with --fix-unsafe
105+ rules across BuildKit, tally, and Hadolint namespaces
Embedded ShellCheck for shell snippet analysis within RUN instructions
Registry-aware checks without requiring a Docker daemon
AI AutoFix via ACP (Agent Client Protocol) with validation loop
LSP server for VS Code, JetBrains, and any LSP-compatible editor
Multiple output formats: text, JSON, SARIF, GitHub Actions, Markdown
Easy install via Homebrew, WinGet, npm, pip, RubyGems, Go, or Docker
publicApiSurface: tally lint [DOCKERFILE...] — lint one or more Dockerfiles/Containerfiles
tally lint --fix --fix-unsafe — apply safe + AI-powered unsafe fixes
tally lint --slow-checks on|off|auto — registry-aware async checks
tally lint --ai --acp-command <cmd> — AI AutoFix via ACP agent
tally lsp --stdio — Language Server Protocol server
